note: gcloud builds submit inherits .gitignore when no .gcloudignore exists; blanket *.png silently dropped committed dashboard PNG icons from the Cloud Build upload, 404 in prod but fine locally (docker uses .dockerignore). Fixed via repo-root .gcloudignore.
PATCH speakers on active meeting would delete the live Redis segments hash; fixed with status gate 409 + regression test
merge->rename lost source-cluster corrections across mode=replace; fixed with aliases map + regression test
speaker update during running Drive export left stale done file; fixed with rerun_requested + pre-done refresh
concurrent PATCH read-modify-write on meeting.data could drop corrections; fixed with SELECT FOR UPDATE
schema-sync would build the new large-table index non-CONCURRENTLY at startup; fixed with online_only index skip
speaker filter kept old names after merge; fixed by clearing filter on success
